summary: Graduate Mechanical Engineer with strong knowledge of mechanical engineering principles, CAD modeling, manufacturing processes, and engineering documentation. Skilled in SolidWorks, AutoCAD, technical drawings, and problem-solving. Passionate about product development, production support, and continuous improvement. Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams and adapt quickly to new engineering environments.
projects: - Assisted in redesigning a handheld industrial tool improving durability and ergonomics
- Supported material optimization project reducing fixture weight by 18%
- Recognized for improving engineering documentation efficiency

education: Bachelor of Technology in Mechanical Engineering
